damage_path_summary: Silent corruption enters memory before detection and converts one bad excerpt into a global trust problem.
immediate_effect: The owner studies and memorizes a false unit with full confidence.
effect_on_understanding: A wrong ruling, relation, or attribution becomes part of the owner's conceptual map.
effect_on_memorization: The false unit is strengthened through repetition rather than challenged.
effect_on_teaching_others: The owner may repeat and teach the corrupted knowledge as though it were sourced and verified.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: Future learning built on that false node inherits distortion or suspicion.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The first visible mistake is only the moment of discovery, not the start of damage.

damage_path_summary: Attribution error rewrites who said what and corrupts comparative understanding across the science.
immediate_effect: The owner memorizes a view under the wrong scholar or school.
effect_on_understanding: Differences of opinion and authority structures become malformed.
effect_on_memorization: The owner binds the wrong mnemonic and relational map to the wrong source.
effect_on_teaching_others: Students and listeners receive false scholarly lineage.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: Comparative fiqh or usul study built on the library becomes unreliable.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The wording may be correct while the intellectual ownership is false, making the error harder to notice.

damage_path_summary: Taxonomy misplacement teaches knowledge inside the wrong conceptual neighborhood.
immediate_effect: The owner reads a correct-looking excerpt under the wrong leaf.
effect_on_understanding: The branch map in memory becomes structurally wrong.
effect_on_memorization: The owner memorizes false neighbors, false boundaries, and false dependencies.
effect_on_teaching_others: Explanations inherit the same wrong map.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The library stops acting as a shortcut to structure and becomes a source of structural error.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The text itself may not look corrupted, so the damage hides inside the relational layer.

damage_path_summary: Hidden omission makes the user memorize a surgically cleaned artifact as though it were faithful source flow.
immediate_effect: The owner studies with false reassurance that nothing important was left out.
effect_on_understanding: Scope and context can be silently narrowed, widened, or detached from the original discourse.
effect_on_memorization: A misleadingly clean version gets reinforced in memory.
effect_on_teaching_others: The owner may teach the excerpt as if it were the source's exact uninterrupted form.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: Trust in all excerpt surgery becomes harder to maintain.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The unit may feel easier to study precisely because the deception is smooth.

damage_path_summary: Suboptimality wastes years by lowering the ceiling of what the library could have enabled.
immediate_effect: Study still happens, so the failure hides behind apparent productivity.
effect_on_understanding: The owner gains less structure, less coverage, or less strategic advantage than was possible.
effect_on_memorization: Time is spent memorizing under a weaker system instead of under the best one.
effect_on_teaching_others: What gets taught is narrower or less well-organized than it could have been.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: A lifetime of study may be good, yet permanently beneath the achievable maximum.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: Nothing obviously crashes; the damage appears only as lost decades of potential.

damage_path_summary: Budget ceilings turn the library into a partial corpus that can look complete enough to overtrust.
immediate_effect: Ingestion stops or slows well before the intended source universe is covered.
effect_on_understanding: The owner studies through a knowledge horizon shaped by cost rather than truth or relevance.
effect_on_memorization: Memory consolidates partial coverage as though it were the meaningful whole.
effect_on_teaching_others: Blind spots may be taught without realizing they are blind spots.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The project remains permanently bounded by finance rather than by learning ability.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: A partial library can still feel vast, which makes the hidden cap more dangerous.

damage_path_summary: Backup failure converts years of work into discontinuity or irrecoverable loss.
immediate_effect: Core data or app state cannot be restored reliably.
effect_on_understanding: The owner loses access to accumulated structure and prior study anchors.
effect_on_memorization: Memory loses its external scaffold and verification base.
effect_on_teaching_others: Continuity of reference and reuse collapses.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The lifetime project may become impossible to inherit or continue.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: A backup that only fails when needed is worse than no backup because it encouraged overtrust.

damage_path_summary: Bad preserved data becomes bad training substrate, multiplying defects through future models.
immediate_effect: The next intelligence layer learns from contaminated structure or labels.
effect_on_understanding: Future answers inherit systematic distortions rather than isolated mistakes.
effect_on_memorization: The owner may memorize model-generated derivatives of old defects.
effect_on_teaching_others: Incorrect patterns get repeated at scale and with higher apparent fluency.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The system begins generating its own corrupted continuation of the project.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: It is not just data storage failure; it is future cognition failure.

damage_path_summary: Weak provenance turns every later dispute into a costly and inconclusive investigation.
immediate_effect: The owner cannot quickly verify where a questionable item came from.
effect_on_understanding: Doubt spreads wider than the original issue because nothing is easy to audit.
effect_on_memorization: The owner may hesitate to trust even correct material.
effect_on_teaching_others: Citations and explanations become less defensible.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The library stops functioning as a stable scholarly memory.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The damage lies in future audit paralysis, not only in the first missing field.

damage_path_summary: False confidence in presentation magnifies the rate and depth of harmful study before detection.
immediate_effect: The owner trusts, memorizes, and depends on material faster than warranted.
effect_on_understanding: Wrong or weakly grounded knowledge receives the same mental status as verified knowledge.
effect_on_memorization: Fluent presentation helps lock unsafe material into memory.
effect_on_teaching_others: The owner may cite the library's polish as a reason to trust it publicly.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: Later correction feels like betrayal, not just debugging.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: Polish is a force multiplier for both good and bad systems.

damage_path_summary: Insufficient research silently hardcodes avoidable weaknesses into every later engine.
effect_on_understanding: The owner studies through behaviors that were never properly justified.
effect_on_memorization: Memory is built on outputs shaped by under-researched rules and defaults.
effect_on_teaching_others: Errors may be transmitted with undue confidence because they originated in design, not a visible bug.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: Downstream engines inherit flaws that are expensive to unwind later.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: The first missing research step can echo through years of output.

damage_path_summary: Dependency or lock-in failure interrupts access or forces lossy migration of the life-project.
immediate_effect: Access to key data or processing paths becomes unstable or unavailable.
effect_on_understanding: Study continuity breaks and historical references may not survive migration cleanly.
effect_on_memorization: External anchors for recall and verification degrade.
effect_on_teaching_others: The owner may be unable to retrieve or demonstrate the underlying knowledge reliably.
effect_on_long_term_scholarship: The project loses sovereignty over its own future.
why_this_is_worse_than_it_first_looks: A knowledge system that depends on fragile external continuity is not truly owned.
